title: cyclosorus longipes
intro: Cyclosorus longipes, also known as the Long-stalked Comb Fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae, specifically a species of fern that thrives in tropical regions. Traditionally, Cyclosorus longipes has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and even exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cyclosorus longipes are often used to make tea, and its extracts are used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
